case_title: EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC VS. DAVID G. MANUEL et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-18-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-19-2013 CONTINUED TO MAR-18-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-19-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MANUEL, DAVID G. DOES 1 TO 5, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-21-2013
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-19-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC SERVED MAR-09-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MANUEL, DAVID G.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
